nonBlockingIssues.description: company.md cross-references ADR-006-portal-host-boundaries.md but the actual file is ADR-006-portal-and-host-boundary-separation.md (broken link).
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Update the ADR-006 cross-reference to match the actual filename.

nonBlockingIssues.description: company.md tenant lifecycle state diagram omits ACTIVE → DEACTIVATED transition (text list includes it).
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add ACTIVE → DEACTIVATED arrow to the ASCII state diagram.

nonBlockingIssues.description: auth.md could mention blacklisted token cleanup frequency more explicitly.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add a brief note about blacklisted token cleanup scheduling in the Token and Session Revocation section.

rejectedObservations.observation: ADR filename reference mismatch — worker suggests adding ADR filenames to library to prevent future mismatches.
rejectedObservations.reason: The actual fix is to correct the broken link in company.md (a non-blocking content fix), not to create a library entry enumerating ADR filenames. The ADR index already serves as the authoritative source for ADR names.
